# Matt Pocock Skills

This directory contains copied skills from `mattpocock/skills`.

Upstream repository: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills

Upstream commit:

```text
f304057d61d3df3c9fd992ac2b6e3833cb9325fb
```

Matt Pocock's repository is MIT licensed. A copy of the upstream license is included in this directory as `LICENSE`.

These skills are copied rather than symlinked because the `skills` CLI's GitHub discovery path reads repository tree contents. Submodules and symlinked skill folders do not expose nested upstream `SKILL.md` files as normal installable skill directories.
